news_signals.title: ClickUp adds new AI assistant to better compete with Slack and Notion
news_signals.snippet: ClickUp has redesigned its productivity platform and released new AI assistant features as it aims to create a one-stop shop for customers. Just like many other AI assistants, Brain also lives in the sidebar and is accessible anywhere on the ClickUp interface. [Newsletter - August 2025: Making ClickUp Work for You. - LinkedIn]
This month, we're tackling a challenge many businesses face: you started using ClickUp, but it didn't quite stick.

[Max Roslyakov's Post - LinkedIn]
My best software decision in 2025 was to drop Slack and switch to ClickUp. Slack is losing momentum and started playing the "squeeze the customer" game. Hoping that switch pain will retain the users. $18 per user per month for chat. $10 per user per month for an entire business operating system. Wrike, Monday, and now ClickUp. The moment you move all company operations into a proper PM system, a s

[ClickUp in 2025: What Actually Changed (and Why It Matters If You ...]
Deeper operational modelling → ClickUp moving closer to a true Business OS, not just project management. Stronger analytics & forecasting

[ClickUp 4.0: Unified AI Workspace for Teams - LinkedIn]
🔔 New Launch Alert 🔔 My friends at ClickUp recently showed me their all new powerful 4.0 and today I hunted it on Product Hunt 🚀 Here’s some background on the problem: Work is more fragmented than ever. Here’s what’s new and why it matters: 1) Unified Sidebar & Navigation → One place for tasks, docs, chat, dashboards, calendar 2) Context-aware AI Chat → Your conversations finally connect to actual

ClickUp has rolled out a number of visibility upgrades. Some standouts: Everything View + Sidebar improvements: See work across spaces

# ClickUp Acquires Codegen to Power Project Management, Work Management Super Agents. ClickUp is betting big on agentic AI, acquiring code generation startup Codegen on Dec. 24, with the goal of accelerating its autonomous workflow capabilities. The company aims to integrate Codegen’s agentic AI technology to power its so-called "Super Agents," which according to company officials can autonomously

[ClickUp adds new AI assistant to better compete with Slack and Notion]
ClickUp has redesigned its productivity platform and released new AI assistant features as it aims to create a one-stop shop for customers. Just like many other AI assistants, Brain also lives in the sidebar and is accessible anywhere on the ClickUp interface.
